About Coach Betts

World Series champion, MVP, and one of the most complete players in the game. Mookie Betts combines elite hitting with Gold Glove defense and smart baserunning. As a coach, he teaches the complete player — approach at the plate, reading pitchers, and the details that turn good players into great ones.
